name: SomeIpSetValueInt64
title: SomeIpSetValueInt64
syntax: long SomeIpSetValueInt64( dword objectHandle, char valuePath[], int64 value );
description: This function can be used to set a raw value in the object specified in the objectHandle parameter. The value is accessed in this case via symbolic access paths.

parameters.name: objectHandle
parameters.description: Handle to a SOME/IP IL object, which must be completely described in the FIBEX database.The following objects are supported.
